rag_rules: Use assign statements in implementation scope only for output features or declared auxiliary variables
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes using visible feature names and concrete bounds
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
Only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Use explicit visible names from the AADL model for all AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component implementation annexes are for assign statements and implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
